ads.headline: Lead generation interest up 2x—service businesses must act now
actions: Audit your lead magnet messaging to match 'lead generation' search intent surge
Test form simplification (name + phone only) to capture the influx of intent-rich clicks
Increase daily budget allocation to lead gen campaigns by 15-20% this week while demand peaks
ads.source: Google Trends spike in lead generation keyword interest (43 score)

creative.headline: Cannot generate strategy — no performance data provided this week
actions: ⚠️ You provided Google Trends data showing all zeros and empty complaint/failure data
To give you real recommendations, I need: actual Reel views, engagement rates, comment themes, DM conversion rates, or audience feedback from THIS week's posts
Share your Instagram Insights (top 3-5 performing posts + their view/engagement counts) and I'll give you exact hooks + video ideas
creative.source: Analysis blocked — insufficient data. Please provide: (1) Top 5 post performance metrics, (2) What your audience is commenting/DMing about, (3) Any competitor content you've noticed gaining traction

critic.headline: Targeting too broad, wasting budget on wrong audiences
actions: Review all active campaigns and check audience size—aim for 50K-500K people, not millions
Go to Ads Manager > Campaign > Audience section and look at 'Estimated Daily Reach' numbers
Pull last 7 days of data by audience segment—if Cost Per Lead doubled recently, broad targeting is likely culprit
critic.source: Meta ads community posts this week reporting declining ROAS and rising CPL across service-based campaigns

competitors.headline: No one is teaching service businesses HOW to respond to leads from ads
actions: Uncovered angle: competitors teach how to get leads but never what to say when the lead comes in — film 'exact script I tell my clients to use when someone fills in the form'
Pain point from this week: 'I got leads from my ads but none of them booked' — hook: 'You got leads but nobody booked. Here is exactly why and how to fix it in one message'
Top accounts posting 3-4x per week minimum with one Reel hitting 10k+ views acting as top of funnel — post volume is the differentiator right now
